title: PersonaDrive Improves Human-Style Driving Simulation Performance
summary: The PersonaDrive pipeline improves closed-loop driving simulations by integrating human-style behavior, enhancing agent performance across driving styles.

title: West U Secures Federal Funding for Safety Plan
summary: West University has secured federal funding to enhance pedestrian safety measures in the area, aiming to reduce accidents and improve community safety.

title: Portland's New Pedestrian Safety Initiative
summary: Portland has introduced a new initiative aimed at enhancing pedestrian safety throughout the city. This program includes various strategies to reduce accidents and improve walkability.
